title: USD/JPY
text: USD/JPY trading at 158.58 — approaching the 160.00 level that has previously triggered BoJ verbal warnings; intervention risk rises on a sustained break above 160.

title: Geopolitical Risk
text: Strait of Hormuz closure drives crude oil volatility — commodity bloc (AUD, CAD, NOK) faces headwinds; monitor for supply-shock escalation.

title: CFTC — EUR
text: EUR net short positioning at 50.0% long — institutional divergence risk as Asset Managers are net long; EUR/USD holds at 1.1767.

title: Risk Regime
text: VIX at 17.5 signals normal volatility — risk-on environment, S&P 500 up +1.20%.

title: AUD/USD
text: AUD/USD trading at 0.7168 — RBA hiking rates supports AUD carry; AUD/USD consolidating above 0.7098.
